hero.title: YouTube Thumbnail
hero.description: Simply input your YouTube video description, and our advanced AI will automatically generate a high-quality, eye-catching thumbnail tailored to your content.

steps.title: Describe your YouTube video
steps.description: Paste your video title, episode description, and key hook (e.g. "before vs after", "10x your views") as the workflow input.

steps.title: Guide the thumbnail style
steps.description: Optionally specify colors, mood, and layout preferences such as "bold text on the left" or "clean tutorial thumbnail".

steps.title: Pick, tweak, and export
steps.description: Choose your favorite design, refine prompts if needed, then export the final thumbnail for upload to YouTube or other platforms.

items.question: What is the AI YouTube Thumbnail Generator template?
items.answer: It's an AI workflow that creates eye-catching YouTube thumbnails from your video description or script. The goal is to help you improve click-through rates with optimized visuals.

items.question: What input should I prepare for thumbnails?
items.answer: Provide your video title, short description, and key hook (e.g., "10x your views," "before vs after"). You can also mention color preferences or emotions you want the thumbnail to convey.

items.question: Does this template follow YouTube thumbnail best practices?
items.answer: The workflow is designed around common best practices such as clear subjects, bold contrast, and focused messaging. You can prompt for specific styles like "minimalist," "reaction face," or "clean tutorial layout."

items.question: Can I use this for multiple platforms, not just YouTube?
items.answer: Yes. Although optimized for YouTube, you can adapt the output for other platforms (e.g., course covers, video cover images) by adjusting size and cropping.

items.question: Will the AI add text to the thumbnail?
items.answer: You can request text such as short titles or key phrases in your prompts. For precise typography and brand fonts, you can refine the exported thumbnail in your design tool.

items.question: How fast can I generate thumbnails for a batch of videos?
items.answer: Single thumbnails typically render in seconds to a couple of minutes. For batches, you can run multiple prompts and then select the best thumbnails to reuse or modify.

items.question: How are credits used for the YouTube thumbnail workflow?
items.answer: Each thumbnail generation consumes credits based on the image model and resolution. Because thumbnails are relatively small, this template is usually very credit-efficient.
